data.name: Nav_Calendar
data.comment: Navigation menu item for the calendar/home page

data.name: Nav_RecurringBills
data.comment: Navigation menu item for recurring bills

data.name: Nav_AutoTransfers
data.comment: Navigation menu item for automatic transfers

data.name: Nav_Reconciliation
data.comment: Navigation menu item for account reconciliation

data.name: Nav_Transfers
data.comment: Navigation menu item for transfers between accounts

data.name: Nav_MainNavigation
data.comment: Aria label for the main navigation sidebar

data.name: Nav_MainMenu
data.comment: Aria label for the navigation menu

data.name: Layout_SkipToMainContent
data.comment: Skip link for keyboard users to bypass navigation

data.name: Layout_AppName
data.comment: Application name displayed in the header

data.name: Layout_ExpandMenu
data.comment: Tooltip when navigation menu is collapsed

data.name: Layout_CollapseMenu
data.comment: Tooltip when navigation menu is expanded

data.name: Layout_AiAssistant
data.comment: Label for the AI assistant chat toggle button

data.name: Layout_OpenSourceLicenses
data.comment: Footer link to open source licenses page

data.name: Layout_QuickAddTransaction
data.comment: Title for the quick add transaction bottom sheet

data.name: Common_Remaining
data.comment: Label shown after remaining budget amount

data.name: Common_OverBudget
data.comment: Label shown when spending exceeds budget

data.name: ConsolidationSuggestions_Title
data.comment: Page title for the rule consolidation suggestions page

data.name: ConsolidationSuggestions_RunAnalysis
data.comment: Button label to trigger rule consolidation analysis

data.name: ConsolidationSuggestions_Analyzing
data.comment: Loading message shown while analysis is running

data.name: ConsolidationSuggestions_NotYetRun
data.comment: Empty state title before the user has run analysis

data.name: ConsolidationSuggestions_NotYetRunDesc
data.value: Click 'Analyze Rules' to detect consolidation opportunities.
data.comment: Empty state description before the user has run analysis

data.name: ConsolidationSuggestions_NoSuggestions
data.comment: Empty state title when analysis returned no suggestions

data.name: ConsolidationSuggestions_NoSuggestionsDesc
data.comment: Empty state description when analysis returned no suggestions

data.name: ConsolidationSuggestions_Accept
data.comment: Button label to accept a consolidation suggestion

data.name: ConsolidationSuggestions_Dismiss
data.comment: Button label to dismiss a consolidation suggestion

data.name: ConsolidationSuggestions_Undo
data.comment: Button label to undo an accepted consolidation

data.name: ConsolidationSuggestions_ConflictingRules
data.comment: Label showing how many rules will be consolidated (format parameter: count)

data.name: ConsolidationSuggestions_MergedPattern
data.comment: Label for the merged/consolidated rule pattern

data.name: Nav_ConsolidationSuggestions
data.comment: Navigation menu item for rule consolidation suggestions

data.name: Rules_FindConsolidations
data.comment: Button label to navigate to the rule consolidation suggestions page

data.name: ConsolidationSuggestions_AllDone
data.comment: Title shown when all consolidation suggestions have been reviewed

data.name: ConsolidationSuggestions_AllDoneDesc
data.value: All consolidation suggestions have been reviewed.
data.comment: Description shown when all consolidation suggestions have been reviewed

data.name: ConsolidationSuggestions_ViewRules
data.comment: Link text to navigate back to the rules page after reviewing consolidations
